feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8380 Red Flags Edition Previous Thread: >>84220023 F-lis…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8380 Red Flags Edition Previous Thread: >>84220023 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

But nah, they’re out here with their butthole outline on full display for the entire beach to see. Do they actually like having fabric riding up their ass all day while getting sand in there? entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is this a good deal? My old pos laptop that's like 7 years old died on its ass a…
entry.content: Is this a good deal? My old pos laptop that's like 7 years old died on its ass and I need a new one. I'm not really interested in building a PC at this stage because my work is making me travel a lot more so I want something that kind of handles every day stuff including some gaming. Mostly titles like PoE 2, Warhammer Total War 3 and a few other older games that don't really need a 5070. So I was thinking of getting the slightly cheaper alternative that has an 8gb 5050 in it instead. Prices are
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Dearest Cui Sun
entry.content: Dear Cui Sun I have now lost all connections to you. In a way it is a relief. All of the hope is gone. But I fear I can never remove you from my heart. What will I do without you. I will never understand. I will never know if you left because you hated me, or because you loved me. My soul is doomed to be tortured for etermity. Now I can only pray to God. I will spend the rest of my life pursuing you. I pray that I can see you before I die an old man. I will always love you, Your Caleb
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Addicted to last.fm
entry.content: Ok imagine its 2036. Everyone has their mandatory government-issued surveillance chips and we are all hyper-intelligent to be hyper-conscientious. Aside from the obvious benefits like how there is no crime and how everyone gets to go to heaven (if we have the right to die, that is), last.fm also auto-scrobbles everything you hear whether in the mall or because it had earwormed itself into your brain. And maybe for a fully accurate listening history it’s worth giving up free will for. Does anyone
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /o/ Auto: My 03 avalon is about to hit 260K. Should I continue to put money into keeping i…
entry.content: My 03 avalon is about to hit 260K. Should I continue to put money into keeping it going? I've taken care of it so far but eventually the seals and rubber parts are all going to fail and i feel like its a losing game at that point. Starting to get some rust holes in the wheel wells but other than that no major body issues. known issues >P/S belt squealing >bad ABS speed sensor >headlight seal cracked moisture getting inside >moderate rust on the underside makes a lot of diy wrenching difficult >E
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3042

No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Start playing Deltarune expecting to laugh at Deer Rape >Actually get attached …
entry.content: >Start playing Deltarune expecting to laugh at Deer Rape >Actually get attached to the characters. >Get to the part where Susie talks to Kris about how they used to hang out as kids. >Start to miss my friend group I played pretend with and think about how much Susie and Noelle remind me of some of the girls who played with me. >Remember how they're all on opposite sides of the country now and a few are already married. This a common experience?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Was the Dreamcast actually powerful at launch? Or the beneficiary of no competit…
entry.content: Was the Dreamcast actually powerful at launch? Or the beneficiary of no competition? >Support for Sega's own fast/streamlined/documented SDK or Windows CE (to make porting games from the PC easier) >Hitachi SH4 chips >Designed by Hideki Sato, the "father of Sega hardware", with input from Naka and Iizuka >PVR on Dreamcast was much better than Saturn GPU >Rarely-used volumetric per-pixel shadows and volumetric fog features >Order Independent Transparency and is the only system to date that came w
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: ITT: Outdated boomer concepts in films and tv shows
entry.content: >Cameron has never been in love - at least, nobody's ever been in love with him. If things don't change for him, he's gonna marry the first girl he lays, and she's gonna treat him like shit, because she will have given him what he has built up in his mind as the end-all, be-all of human existence. She won't respect him, 'cause you can't respect somebody who kisses your ass. It just doesn't work.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Rest in Peace, gado [19XX-2026]
entry.content: Because [s4s] is known as the nicest board across all of 4chan, I will be posting this message here: Today, on July, 22nd, 2026, avogadoposter passed away due to unknown causes. While "gado", as we affectionately knew them, may have been rude at times, they were also friendly, fun and shared laughs and memes with us. We knew nothing about gado but we still very much enjoyed spending time with them and welcomed them like family, just surely as much as they would have for us. I personally don't kn
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /int/ International: Since the Volga is the traditional dwelling of the Scythians, who the Aryans of …
entry.content: Since the Volga is the traditional dwelling of the Scythians, who the Aryans of Pakistan are descended from, why don't we settle the troubles of the west with an agreement to send the virile and healthy Pakistani Aryans to Tartarstan where they may unleash their natural conquestal tendencies on the Asiatic invaders? This way the Aryan peoples may once again be united and what's more in the quest of reclaiming our rightful lands!
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /mu/ Music: "At the time I was in a band called Smile and I thought I was a pretty good guit…
entry.content: "At the time I was in a band called Smile and I thought I was a pretty good guitarist. One day I hear Are You Experienced at a party and thought 'Come on, he can't possibly make those sound effects on 'Stone Free.' This has to be some kind of studio trickery.' Sometime later I caught a bus down to London to see Hendrix perform. And there you had it. He played the entire 'Stone Free' perfectly, just like it sounded on the record, and I thought 'Oh well, back to the drawing board.'"
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What's the verdict on the Xbox consoles? It was an affordable way of playing Doo…
entry.content: What's the verdict on the Xbox consoles? It was an affordable way of playing Doom 3, Halo, Morrowind, KOTOR, etc. Xbox essentially shipped with a Pentium 3 733 MHz, 64MB DDR, a (slightly customized) Geforce 3, and an 8GB HDD for $299. A GeForce 3 was a pretty high-end card for 2001 too, a GeForce 2 and Directx 7 were really the standards still in 2001. Xbox OS was basically hyper-optimized Windows 2000, it's probably one of the most performant consumer-oriented x86 operating system ever written.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Losers thread
entry.content: Any real losers on here? I'm in my 30s with no job, dwindling savings, retired parents who are barely scraping by, and their health is getting worse. Only a matter of time til I'm on my own and I already deal with depression and anxiety, I can't see things getting any better as time goes on. Fellow losers, any tips on coping?
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >North East rock legend Bryan Ferry has spoken of his flight from hell when a ma…
entry.content: >North East rock legend Bryan Ferry has spoken of his flight from hell when a madman grabbed the controls of the plane in which he was travelling. The Roxy Music singer was on a trip to Nairobi in December 2000 when a passenger began fighting with the pilot for control of the British Airways Boeing 747. >The plane plunged 10,000ft in a series of nose dives but while other passengers screamed in terror Ferry said he was more shocked by the attacker's socks. >He said: "The crazy man's socks weren'

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /dig/ draw and improvement general
entry.content: Boxes of our bodies edition Previous: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83907720 Note: There is not, and there will never be, an official /dig/ discord server. Post what you're working on, ask questions, discuss general art-related things. Make your unforgivable fetishes come to life. Welcome: New and seasoned artists looking for advice, critique and support. When giving criticism, please, give actual criticism not just "LOL LOOMIS". Let's not become another /ic/ NOT welcome: /ic/ crabs, /tr
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /t/ Torrents: 3DLoveAndPeace Patreon Dump (April 20, 2026)
entry.content: All of 3DLoveAndPeace's collection up until April 20, 2026. Featuring characters from mostly Dead or Alive alongside a few others game series. https://drive.google.com/drive/fold ers/1LGclFS-NOKJI2S2MYSAzHe-90ctpYT OE?usp=sharing https://www.patreon.com/3DLoveAndPe ace Also includes the couple so animations in 4K and shared Blender scene files. Miscellanous wise there's a couple unsorted images, description .json files, preview images and just others like WIPs/screenshots.
entry.dc:creator: /t/ Torrents

entry.title: /news/ News: AIPAC Is Losing Its Sway Over Democrats
entry.content: The pro-Israel group’s absolutist stance has alienated even moderate Democrats who support the Jewish state. https://www.yahoo.com/news/politics /articles/aipac-losing-sway-over-de mocrats-111559774.html WASHINGTON — In 2024, a super PAC allied with the American Israel Public Affairs Committee spent $4 million to boost then-state Sen. Sarah Elfreth in a contested Democratic primary in Maryland. It’s not an exaggeration to say the money was decisive: It was more than twice as much as Elfreth’s ca
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: STICKY NOW. Kong bros.....
entry.content: Kong bros .... We lost her....

entry.title: /int/ International: I feel like this is the median eye/hair/skin color and hair shape in my country.…
entry.content: I feel like this is the median eye/hair/skin color and hair shape in my country. what's it like in yours?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: My old folks are getting old imc
entry.content: I've had a lot of failings in life. I'm a khhv with few friends, low chance of making it, but I don't care about that. I don't even want a relationship anymore. What keeps me up at night is that I see my old folks getting older and I worry about them. We've never had much and live paycheck to paycheck, and unlike the stories of rich boomers hoarding all the wealth, they will probably get old with no safety net at all. I am not sure how am I even going to be in a position to help them in my count
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International
